info.description: API for camp registration and camp operations.
info.title: Camp Registration API

get.description: Catalog organization, season, and program options.
Sessions visible to the active organization.

post.description: Create a session for the active organization.

post.description: Record daily attendance, check-in, check-out, or absence for a camper.

get.description: Families visible to the active organization.

get.description: Family detail with adults, campers, and contacts.

post.description: Add an adult to a family.

post.description: Register a camper in a session for this family.

Cancel an active registration for this family.

Offer available capacity to the next waitlisted registration.

put.description: Replace the authoritative waitlist order for a session.

post.description: Queue another delivery of an active waitlist offer.
Cancel an active waitlist offer and keep its registration in queue.
Cancel an active offer and move its registration to the end of the queue.

patch.description: Update a contact in a family.

get.description: Reusable form templates, immutable versions, and completion totals.

patch.description: Revise the editable draft without changing published versions.

get.description: Published forms required for the parent’s confirmed registrations.

put.description: Save a draft or submit a version-bound parent form response.

get.description: Tenant-scoped waitlist automation and notification delivery health.

post.description: Re-evaluate a missing-recipient notification or replay a terminal delivery failure.
